# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: vm.jinja
- path: sql.jinja
- path: bucket.jinja
- path: lb.jinja

resources:
- name: app-bucket
  type: bucket.jinja
  properties:
    bucketName: $(ref.project.projectId)-app-bucket
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: app-sql
  type: sql.jinja
  properties:
    instanceName: app-sql
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    tier: db-custom-1-3840
    diskSizeGb: 20
    diskType: PD_SSD
    databaseName: appdb
    rootPassword: changeme-root-password

- name: app-vm
  type: vm.jinja
  properties:
    instanceName: app-vm
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: e2-medium
    sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
    network: global/networks/default
    subnetwork: regions/us-central1/subnetworks/default
    tags:
    - http-server
    startupScript: |
      #!/bin/bash
      apt-get update
      apt-get install -y nginx mysql-client
      systemctl enable nginx
      systemctl start nginx
      cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<EOF
      <html>
      <body>
      <h1>GCP MVP App Stack</h1>
      <p>Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, and Load Balancer configured.</p>
      </body>
      </html>
      EOF
    serviceAccountEmail: default
    scopes:
    - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform

- name: app-lb
  type: lb.jinja
  properties:
    backendInstance: $(ref.app-vm.selfLink)
    zone: us-central1-a
    port: 80
    healthCheckPath: /
    network: global/networks/default

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["bucketName"] }}
    location: {{ properties["location"] }}
    storageClass: {{ properties["storageClass"] }}

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
    region: {{ properties["region"] }}
    databaseVersion: {{ properties["databaseVersion"] }}
    settings:
      tier: {{ properties["tier"] }}
      dataDiskSizeGb: {{ properties["diskSizeGb"] }}
      dataDiskType: {{ properties["diskType"] }}
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks: []
- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-db
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    name: {{ properties["databaseName"] }}
    instance: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.name)
- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-root-password
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    name: root
    instance: $(ref.{{ properties["instanceName"] }}.name)
    host: "%"
    password: {{ properties["rootPassword"] }}

---
resources:
- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
    machineType: zones/{{ properties["zone"] }}/machineTypes/{{ properties["machineType"] }}
    tags:
      items:
{% for tag in properties["tags"] %}
      - {{ tag }}
{% endfor %}
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: {{ properties["sourceImage"] }}
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: {{ properties["network"] }}
      subnetwork: {{ properties["subnetwork"] }}
      accessConfigs:
      - name: External NAT
        type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: {{ properties["serviceAccountEmail"] }}
      scopes:
{% for scope in properties["scopes"] %}
      - {{ scope }}
{% endfor %}
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
{% for line in properties["startupScript"].splitlines() %}
          {{ line }}
{% endfor %}

---
resources:
- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: {{ properties["port"] }}
    requestPath: {{ properties["healthCheckPath"] }}

- name: app-target-pool
  type: compute.v1.targetPool
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["zone"][:-2] }}
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    instances:
    - {{ properties["backendInstance"] }}

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    region: {{ properties["zone"][:-2] }}
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: {{ properties["port"] }}
    target: $(ref.app-target-pool.selfLink)
